## Checklist

### Required
- [ ] `make test-quick` passes (or equivalent pattern test)
- [ ] `cfn-lint` passes on modified templates
- [ ] No secrets or PII in committed files
- [ ] README updated (if public-facing change)

### If applicable
- [ ] New pattern follows `CONTRIBUTING.md` checklist
- [ ] DemoMode=true works without FSx for ONTAP
- [ ] Governance Note present (regulated/safety-critical domains)
- [ ] Performance Considerations documented
- [ ] Data classification labels defined

### Documentation
- [ ] JA/EN parity maintained (if bilingual doc modified)
- [ ] Links verified in modified docs
- [ ] Architecture diagram updated (if workflow changed)
